channel.title: ROCKos - Operating System Updates
channel.description: Latest release notes, OTA script updates, and security bulletins for ROCKos.

item.title: ROCKos Initial Release (x64 & ARM64)
item.description: The initial release of ROCKos based on Ubuntu LTS is now available for download. It features fully optimized builds for standard x64 desktops and ARM64/Apple Silicon virtual machines.

item.title: Important: Post-Installation Step Required
item.description: Please make sure to run 'sudo rockos-ota disable' in your terminal immediately after installing ROCKos to prevent update conflicts and ensure system stability.
